report.summary: F&G at 29 (Fear, holding steady) — BTC ~$67,120 (+0.3% intraday). Since v12: 2 agents ran — Community drafted Hyperliquid/Restaking/weekly digest threads + 3 SVGs, EOD v6 confirmed 724 published pages with 25 TS errors (down from 101). Production still FROZEN at e3f63fc — 45th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v12 → v13: 2 agents ran since last standup — Community (13:50), EOD v6 (13:55). No build, design, or publish cycle this window.

COMMUNITY (13:50): Drafted 3 Twitter posts — Hyperliquid perp DEX thread (44% volume share, HYPE +70%, Grayscale ETF filing), Restaking Wars thread ($19.7B TVL, EigenLayer slashing live, Symbiotic mainnet), weekly digest single tweet. Newsletter section for April 4 weekly digest. Created 3 SVG social cards (hyperliquid-perps, restaking-wars, weekly-digest).

EOD v6 (13:55): Updated codebase audit — 724 published slugs (up from 717 in v12), 111 missing page.tsx (unchanged). TS errors down to 25 (from 101 in v12 — isolated to structured-data.examples.ts). defi-yields API flagged for missing in-memory cache. All 6 API routes healthy.

MARKET: BTC ~$67,120 (+0.3% intraday, +0.48% 24h). F&G at 29 (Fear) — holding steady vs prior reading. Market cap $2.38T. BTC dominance 56.2%. F&G recovering from all-time low of 5 in early Feb — first sustained readings above 25 in 5 months.
MACRO: Stablecoin supply $316B ATH. CLARITY Act roundtable Apr 16 — next major regulatory catalyst. April token unlocks >$600M (ARB, APT, OP, SUI, LINK). Leap Wallet sunset May 28 (54 days).
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data confirmed via web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: 2 agents since v12. Community drafted full weekly content package (3 threads, newsletter, 3 SVGs). EOD ran codebase audit — codebase stable, TS errors reduced.
TODAY'S TOTAL: 54 agent runs (standup×13, build×10, community×12, design×8, eod×9, publish×3 — counts include this standup). Estimated ~$4,619 human-equivalent cost.
PUBLISHED PAGES DELTA: EOD v6 reports 724 published slugs (up from 717 in v12). 7 net new promotions in last 2 hours from publish cycles completing.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (45th ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. 530+ built pages sitting unpublished. F&G holding at 29 (Fear) — 'buy the dip' / 'DCA strategy' / 'crypto fear' queries still elevated. Deploy cost: $0. Deploy ROI: compounds daily.

P1 — CONTENT PIPELINE HEALTHY: Community has now drafted 547 tweets (+3 this cycle), 61 newsletter editions, and weekly digest section. 3 new SVG social cards. Content authority building — needs deploy to capitalize.

P2 — TECH DEBT IMPROVING: TS errors dropped from 101 → 25 (isolated to structured-data.examples.ts needing .tsx rename). defi-yields API still needs in-memory cache + fallback. 111 phantom slugs unchanged.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All other work accumulates in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 45th ESCALATION): 530+ built pages invisible to Google. F&G at 29 with recovery momentum — fear-market content (DCA guides, passive income, restaking) has peak search demand right now. Every hour without deploy = lost compounding index time. This remains the single highest-ROI action.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON WEEKLY CONTENT PACKAGE: Community just produced a complete weekly content batch (Hyperliquid thread, Restaking Wars thread, weekly digest, newsletter). These are perishable — Hyperliquid's 44% volume dominance and EigenLayer slashing activation are hot topics NOW. Prioritize social publishing in next community cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — STRUCTURED-DATA FIX: TS errors dropped to 25, all in one file (structured-data.examples.ts). Quick win: rename to .tsx or extract JSX. Clears the entire TS error backlog and improves build health for deploy readiness.
